title: selaginella carinata
intro: Selaginella carinata, also known as the spiny spike moss, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and alkaloids. The health benefits of Selaginella carinata include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be consumed as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
